# requirements.txt for CI / minimal `pip install -r` flows.
#
# Hand-curated, NOT auto-generated. The canonical direct-dep list with
# version specs lives in `pyproject.toml [project] dependencies`; this
# file mirrors it with the same version constraints so CI (GitHub
# Actions) gets a clean install without pulling `uv` into the workflow.
#
# Two rules for keeping it in sync:
#   1. Every package in pyproject.toml [project].dependencies must also
#      appear here with a compatible version spec.
#   2. Tests enforce rule 1 — see
#      trading/tests/unit/test_requirements_sync.py.
#
# If you add a dep, add it to BOTH files. If you remove one, remove it
# from both. The optional [project.optional-dependencies] extras (ml,
# torch) live in pyproject.toml only — installed via `pip install -e .[ml]`.
#
# An earlier header claimed this file was auto-generated via
# `uv pip compile`. It was not — the sections, inline comments, and
# [ml] commented block all get stripped by a real pip-compile pass.
# Honest framing above replaces the stale claim.

# Core web framework
fastapi>=0.115.0
uvicorn[standard]>=0.30.0
python-multipart>=0.0.9
pydantic>=2.0.0
python-dotenv>=1.0.0

# Streaming / SSE
sse-starlette>=2.0.0
websockets>=12.0
httpx-sse>=0.4.0

# Database
aiosqlite>=0.20.0
asyncpg>=0.29.0

# Redis
redis[hiredis]>=5.0.0

# LLM providers
anthropic>=0.40.0
openai>=1.0.0
groq>=0.4.0

# Trading / market data
ib_async>=1.0.0
yfinance>=0.2.0
ccxt>=4.0.0

# Prediction markets
py-clob-client>=0.34.0
web3>=7.0.0

# ML / statistics
xgboost>=2.0.0
hmmlearn>=0.3.0

# Scheduling
croniter>=3.0.0

# Knowledge graph
networkx>=3.0.0

# Utilities
pyyaml>=6.0.0
httpx>=0.27.0
matplotlib>=3.8.0
feedparser>=6.0.0
PyJWT>=2.8.0

# Observability
opentelemetry-api>=1.20.0
opentelemetry-sdk>=1.20.0
opentelemetry-exporter-otlp-proto-http>=1.20.0
prometheus-fastapi-instrumentator>=6.1.0
sentry-sdk[fastapi,opentelemetry]>=2.0.0
structlog>=24.0.0
asgi-correlation-id>=4.0.0

# Rate limiting
slowapi>=0.1.9
limits>=3.13.0

# Bittensor
bittensor>=10.2.0

# Supabase
supabase>=2.0.0

# Testing
pytest>=8.0.0
pytest-asyncio>=0.24.0
pytest-timeout>=2.4.0
pytest-xdist>=3.5.0

# Optional: PyTorch ecosystem (install with: pip install -e ".[torch]")
# torch>=2.5.0
# torchvision>=0.20.0

# Optional: ML/RL stack (install with: pip install -e ".[ml]")
# gymnasium>=0.29.0
# stable-baselines3>=2.1.0
# shimmy>=1.1.0
# sentence-transformers>=3.0.0
# hnswlib — used by journal/indexer.py for the optional HNSW semantic index.
# Kept at top level (not in the commented-out [ml] block) because
# trading/tests/unit/test_journal/test_indexer*.py depend on it at test-
# collection time. importorskip in the tests is a safety net if we ever
# drop it again.
hnswlib==0.8.0
sqlmodel>=0.0.16

# Auth + billing stack — declared in pyproject.toml but previously not
# mirrored here, so CI (which does `pip install -r requirements.txt`)
# couldn't import api/auth/users.py or the Stripe webhook handler.
# Tests were failing at collection with ModuleNotFoundError: bcrypt.
bcrypt>=5.0.0
passlib>=1.7.4
email-validator>=2.0.0
stripe>=10.0.0

# ULID generator — used by utils/ids.py (new_signal_id) and every arb
# signal downstream. pyproject.toml has it; this keeps the two in sync.
ulid-py>=1.1.0
